name: GG_FlushShaken
notes: present the back buffer with the current screen-shake offset (reads _vShakeTicks/_hShakeTicks); shake variant of GG_Flush with no direct callers in the image (dead or indirect shake path)
SEH unwind funnel for GG_FlushShaken — releases the DirectDraw critical section (_ddLCS); compiler-generated 8-byte thunk

name: GG_FlushDirtyLines
notes: the dirty-line blit region of GG_Flush (0x45E120, whose SEH body spans 0x45E120-0x45E356); a Ghidra mid-function split reached only by fall-through (no callers) — not separately callable
SEH unwind funnel for GG_FlushDirtyLines — releases the DirectDraw critical section (_ddLCS); compiler-generated 8-byte thunk
